title: mentha suaveolens subsp. suaveolens
intro: Mentha suaveolens subsp. suaveolens, also known as round-leaved mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of round-leaved mint include relief from digestive issues, nausea, and headaches, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Round-leaved mint can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
